name: zudo-design-token-panel-example-zfb-tailwind
description: zfb (zudo-front-builder) + Tailwind v4 example demonstrating @takazudo/zdtp — tokens registered via @theme block into Tailwind v4's design-system namespaces, showcase and prose pages styled with utility classes.

scripts.dev: lsof -ti:44328 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti:24686 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; concurrently -k -n zfb,tokens-bin -c blue,green "pnpm run _dev:zfb" "pnpm run _dev:tokens-bin"
